steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject is the plural noun "Objects." The phrase naming 49036 Pelion is an appositive example inserted between the subject and the verb, so it does not control subject-verb agreement.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: A, B, and C are singular verb forms, so each incorrectly agrees with the singular example rather than the plural subject. The verb must agree with "Objects." The answer is D.
